titleStmt.title: SII 9.540: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 540. (A.R. No. 424-A of 1928.) ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE BUILDING SITE NORTH OF THE DODDAKEREKATTE AT BASRUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the cyclic year Khara, Mārgaśira, śu. 1, Guruvāra, corresponding to A.D. 1531 November 9, Thursday. It records that Sadānandaseṭṭi and Dēvuseṭṭi made gifts of land and money for the service of the god Mahādēva, consecrated by the former and for feeding Brāhmans and Sumaṅgalīs in the temple, and for the worship of the goddess Durgādēvī during the Navarātri festival. This date falls in the reign of Achyutarāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . kharasaṁvatsarada mārgaśira śu 1 gu lū mahāliṁgadēvara sa�vopadalū durgādēviya
ranū lajjeya sadānaṁdaseṭi pratiṣṭheya māḍidake vineye ke naivēdyake mu 22 . śāṁti mu 18 Eṁṇe mu 10
hūvige mu 1 . gaṁdha mu 1 hāli mu 1 Aṁna sivīḷyake mu 1 . raṁgapūje Abhyaṁgada Eṇe ma 2 . Ī Akkige biṭa
sarvasva sabilādiya voḷage mārāḍaṇa Aḷiyaṁdiru tirumaheggaḍe mādihegaḍeyavara mūla kaṁcubhaṁḍāriya kaḷayagade ba
mu 2 . paḍuva maṇehegaḍeya makiya baḍagaṇa maki ma 1 maneṭhāu muṁdaṇa maki ma 2 Aruvāravāgi koṭa ma 70 �yo bāḷige ka
ṭudeṟu ga 1 ¥ 2 . ma taṁmāṇihegaḍeya mula yīsaraheggaḍeya Aruvāra mūḍa bayala voḷage cāṇeyakeṟeyiṁ teṁkaṇa ba mu 1
nāraṇaseṭiya Uḍi Eṁba ba mu 1 . 0 koḍala maki mu 2 . 0 sa Aṁtarāruvāravāgi koṭa va ga 20 �yo bāḷige teṟu ga 1 ¥ 2 . mataṁ kōṭa
paseṭiya kayya māḍikoṁḍa maki hā 10 teṟu ¥ 0 . koṭa vara ga 4 ¥ 03 kuluseṭiya kayya Āruvārava māḍi koṁḍa bayicake mēre Eti
ya mane ṭhāu maki mu 32 sakuvara ga 8 gēṇi bha mu 18 teru ga 2 ¥ 0 . Upina kuduroḷage Aṇṇa balādiya hāseya Agara do
yibana Atiyamāṭadoḷage kiriya bāḷa bācaṇamēlāḍige mūroṁdupālu Arakuḷa hāḍasāluvaḷiya Agana do
ge baṁda pālu Obaḷi teṁka Agaradalu tanna pālu gade 11 kaṭukālu saha Aruvāra Aṁtarāruvāra mayisāla saha
gē 3 . hebārakaḷa kaya viṣṇumēlāḍi tānu Aruvārava māḍikoṁḍa mūḍaṇa mūlada bā mu 14 gaṁḍina tārinalu saṁkaramēlāḍiya
latāri mūḍaṇa tā mu 5 hāseya Agaradalu Ībaḷi hāde sāmu 1 . 0 saha koṭa va ga 28 ba mu 6 ... nāya bāḷoḷage nāraṇahebā
rana kaya vōṇiya śivaṇamēlāḍiyu Aruvārava mābayalu mu 1 . 3 baṁkanoḍi teṁkaṇahāḷi hā 7 nāraṇamēlāḍi gade mūḍaṇa
śivaṇamēlāḍiya mūḍaṇa beṭṭu maṁdu maki Ardha sadā ko ga 15 baḍi mu 3 ... 0 mattaṁ kaḍamāroḷage nāraṇahebārana kaya śivaṇa
mēlāḍi Ārumāḍikoṇḍa bāḷu bepaḷeya gaḍi mūḍa mu 1 . 0 beṭu maṁdu mara pala saha vā sadā ko ga 20 baḍi mu 4 . 0 kola duralu
nāraṇamayara kayalu nāraṇamēlāḍi koṁḍa bākunimāṇiya gaḍiyiṁ mūḍa kuḷā
gre mu ... 0 huttina paḍuva kuḷāgra pāḷaseṭiya Āgarada paḍu tōṭa bāgila gaddesaha kuḷāgra hā 12 teṁ kōlubāviya
baḍagaṇa hā kuḷāgra hā 4 ... lū kāḷamayara hadi mane malagade saha kuḷāgra hā 20 nāraṇamayara makaḷa bhāgi saha yi
ṣṭu sarvasvada mēle Aṁta koṭa va ga 50 mayisālavāgi koṭa A mu 40 ke huli mu 2 teṟu dēvasa kaḷaci na mu 9 .
hērikudura baḍaga kuduralu Īsarahegaḍeya mūla nāraṇasabācana nāyara mūlada bāḷa gēṇi mu 14 Adake sa
dānaṁdaseṭi �yosaraheggaḍege ko ga 13 baḍi sankarasa bācana mu 4 ... paḍuva kuduralu yīsara hegaḍeya mūla ma
jaragaḍiyiṁ teṁka baya hā 70 sadā kōga 10 teru 4 . gēṇi kaṁcu mu 4 hārunāḍalu sēlūralu cokisāvaṁtara moṁmaga
basavabhaṁḍāriya mūlabayalu meke maki sahā mu 25 . 0 dēvasva beḷe dēvari ge bhata mu 9 Aruvāra kuṁduhoḍekaṭu mū
lādi mayisāla ko va ga 101 dēvasaṁ kaḷaci naḍa bha mu 51 heṁmāḍiya Ereya hitila nāraṇachātrana ba mu 1 . 0 tuṁbi
na bāgila hā mu ... 0 kalānu kuragi hā 2 ke mu . 0 kereya mūḍaṇa maki . 0 mu . maneya muṇamaki mu . 0 mane ṭhāvu maṁdu mara pala
vōṇiya bāyila gade hāḷi mu . 0 sedā koṭa ga 35 keṁcanūra saṁkarāḷuvana moṁmagaḷu saṁkaṁmaĀḷitiya mūla
sadānaṁdaseṭi Aruvārava māḍikoṁḍa baya meke maki mu . ¥ 0 ... 0 yidake dēsiṁgaseṭi ya saṁkaraseṭi ko va ga 33 dēvasva kaḷaci
naḍavadu maṭhadalu ba 1 kke mu 10 gupege mu 1 . hatiyaṁgōḍa voḷage Āṁṇamēlāḍiya mūla bāḷu bitaṇake mu 5 . 0 Aruvāra
da bāḷu ma 3 . yidake Ādi Arththā Āgi koṭa varaha ga 43 naḍava Aki mu 9 kaṁnyāna voḷage tirumamūliya Aḷiya tiṁma
yaseṭṭiyū saṁkunāyakittiya kayyali māḍikoṁḍa ba mu 4 . 0 sadānaṁdaseṭi koṭa Artha va ga 27 �yo bāḷige nakatana kaṭu
deṟu ga . gēṇi A mu 9 guppeya bālugoṭage jīrnōdhārake Ajjiyadēuseṭi koṭa va ga 25 beḷudāṇadalū suttige A mu 5
mataṁ gupege saluva Aṁṇauḍupara kaṁbaḷa gadeya mēle Ājiyanāraṇaseṭi koṭa va ga 16 yidake baḍi A mu 3 . 0 mattaṁ keṁca
nūra tuḷuvāḷuvana mūlada sarvasva kaṁbaḷagade voḷagaṇa Uḍi muṁtāda ba mu 2 ... 0 mallagade saha maki mu 2 . 0 sadānaṁdaseṭi
koṭa va ga 21 gēṇi A mu 4 . 0 yidake veca mahādēvaralū naḍasuvudu sōmavāra pradōṣake A mu 1 ... 2 pradōśadalū mā
ḍuva sahasranāma pūjege A mu 2 tingaḷu 1 ke Ādityadēvara samārādhane 1 ke brā ja 5 ke A mu 4 maṭhake śanivāra brā ja 10 kke
Eṁṇege A mu 5 tingaḷu 1 ke muttayideyara Ūṭake ja 9 ke A mu 9 mattaṁ durgādēviyarige navarātre di 9 ke hōma mutayi
deyaru di 1 ke ja 9 Uḍu sīre hacaḍa mahādēvarige paṁcāmruta hiriya harivāṇa naivēdya dīpada Eṁṇe yiṣṭake sadānaṁdaseṭi dēu
seṭiyū �yo kartaru māḍikoṁḍa sarvasva heṁmāḍiya mādhavamaṁjara makaḷa kayyali koṁḍa sarvasva Aṁṇamaṁjara mūla mādhava
maṁjara makaḷa Āruvāra mu 6 hā 01 . Idake teṟuva mu 2 ... 3 ... koṭa vara ga 35 mattaṁ Āruvāra Aṁtarāruvāravāgi māḍikoṁ
ḍadu kallukuregiya teṁkaṇa gade saha mu 1 . 0 ge teṟige mu ... 8 . koṭa va ga 10 mattaṁ Aruvāra beṭanagade mu 2 ge veṭage mu 1 hā 5 yi
dake koṭa vara ga 20 mataṁ Aruvāra beṭana hāḷi mu . 0 ge teṟige mu hā 8 koṭa va ga 3 Aṁtarāruvārava māḍikoṁ kallana gara yibara
māḍi Adake koṭa va ga 50 teṟu ga . 0 mattaṁ Aruvāra Aṁtarāruvārava māḍikoṁḍa paḍuvaṇa gade mu 1 ... 0 karitalu mu ... 0 hosamā
ṭaveṁba mu 3 yidake teri mu 2 hā 3 koṭa va ga 17 maṁjara kayalaṁ kruṣṇauḍuparu māḍikoṁḍa bāḷu mu 4 ... 2
mane ṭhāvu makki tōṭada Ardha Aḍahāgi koṭa ga 32 maṁjarige mayisālavāgi koṭa va ga 10 Aṁbālada jōgiya
pūjege halarige koṭa ga 8 ke Aṣṭabhaya pūjege pēṭhebagelu naḍa ga 1 Agrahāra lōkācārya Ayanavara taṁma tiṁmaṇa
seṭūroḷage Īsarabhaṁḍāri nāraṇabhaṁḍāriya mū mu 9 hā 5 Aruvāra ga 50 baḍi mu 11 . sadānaṁdaseṭiya ma
gaḷu Idu bāleseṭṭiti māḍida dharmake seṭūralu naḍa Ā mu 10 durggādēviyarige Etu māḍida dhar(ṁ)make sabilāḍi mu 5
mataṁ heṁmāḍiya voḷege kiṟida gōḷiya paḍuvaṇa bayala voḷage Aṁṇachātrana mūla śivamēlāḍiya makaḷu hiriya bāḷa śaṁ
kharamēlāḍi kiṟiya bāḷa nāraṇamēlāḍiyavara Aruvārada bāḷu naggana gade hosakaḷi tōṭa saha bittaṇake nā mu 7 kallanaga
de nā mu 3 Ubhayaṁ ba mu 10 A yoḷagaṇa keṟe maravinakeṟe Eḷariya keṟeya nīru baṁda pālu kallana gade mūḍaṇa
makki hā 2 ke nā mu 1 yidake cipaḷe haditeṟige mu 2 ha 4 . hemmāḍihebārana hadikuḷa mu 1 ... 7 = yidake sadānaṁ
daseṭi Aṁtarāruvārava māḍikoṁḍu koṭa doḍa varaha ga 70 teṟu cepaḷe hadiku mu 2 hā 4 . heṁmāḍiya hebārana pa
riyalū mu 1 ... 7 = �yo bāḷige teṟu kaḷaci gēṇi Ānā mu 17 . ge maṭhadalli nitya ja 1 kke dharmake Ā mu 9 ti 1 ke Aṁnaśu
dhi tupa teṁgu 4 ke varuṣa 1 ke A mu 3 muttēdeyara voṁbhattumaṁdiya dharma A sadānaṁdaseṭiya heṁḍati murāriseṭiti
māḍi dharma mattaṁ mahāliṁgadēvarige Ājiya dēuseṭi rudrābhiśēkhake biṭṭa sarvasva kalunāḍa honaura beṁma
kaĀḷuvitiya maga tirumāḷuvana mūlada bāḷa mēḍina gade ba mu 1 ... 0 mane muṁdaṇa meke mu 2 Alekallameke
hā 10 teṁgina Anubha sahita Aruvāravāgi dēuseṭi ko varaha ga 28 Ī bāḷige kaṭudeṟu ga . 1 teṟu kaḷaci A mu
10 mahāliṁgadēvaralu dhanurmāsada brāhmaṇabhōjanakke Aṁtuseṭi māḍidu bayiraṇaseṭiya Aṁṇuseṭi
haṭiya kudura sarvada mēle koṭa doḍa va ga 50 nā mu 9 .
Digital edition of SII 9.540 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
